entity.summary: Taiwan-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange that announced a shutdown and account-balance audit in January 2020. Later exchange database references show no active markets.
entity.notes: Shutdown was announced as temporary in January 2020, but later exchange database references show no active markets. Death date follows the announced shutdown start date.

events.title: Cobinhood launched
events.description: Cobinhood operated as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2017.
events.notes: Year-level launch date from exchange database reference.

events.title: Shutdown and account audit announced
events.description: Cobinhood announced a shutdown and account-balance audit starting 2020-01-10, telling users not to make deposits and later allowing fund retrieval according to the notice.
events.notes: Used as death_date because public exchange-market references later show no active markets.

evidence.title: Cobinhood exchange profile
evidence.notes: Used for establishment year, centralized exchange classification, and inactive market state.

evidence.title: Cobinhood Announces Shutdown, Claims It Will Audit User Accounts
evidence.notes: Used for shutdown announcement text and operational context.

evidence.title: Cobinhood trade volume and market listings
evidence.notes: Used for untracked market status and no active market data.

evidence.title: Cobinhood markets and trust score
evidence.notes: Used as a second exchange database reference for zero active coins and pairs.
